Title: Directs the department of motor vehicles to create a plan to increase the availability of wheelchair accessible vehicles in New York state outside of the city of New York
Summary: Directs the department of motor vehicles to develop a plan to increase the availability of wheelchair accessible vehicles, by county, in New York state outside of the city of New York; defines accessibility; requires a report to identify any existing local guidelines for accessible vehicles; directs development of benchmarks for increasing wheelchair accessible vehicles.
LawCode: Add §§159-b & 224-b, V & T L; amd §151, Transp L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law and the transportation law, in relation to creating a plan to increase the availability of wheelchair accessible vehicles in New York state outside of the city of New York
